import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Layer0.ConvexFOC
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: inherits inner-loop infrastructure, adds epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  ξ_epoch : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  hξ_epoch_meas : ∀ k t, Measurable (ξ_epoch k t)
  hξ_epoch_indep : iIndepFun (fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  hξ_epoch_ident : ∀ k t, IdentDistrib (ξ_epoch k t) (ξ_epoch 0 0) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (w₀ : E)

/-- Outer-loop iterate: epoch k endpoint after running m inner steps from epoch-start snapshot.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero : outerProcess w₀ 0 = fun _ => w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω := rfl

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k : ℕ) : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [outerProcess]
      -- svrgProcess_measurable requires:
      -- 1. wTilde := outerProcess k (measurable by IH)
      -- 2. gradLTilde := gradF (outerProcess k) (measurable by hsmooth.continuous.measurable.comp ih)
      -- 3. ξ_epoch k (measurable by setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
      exact setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
        (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
        (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ outerProcess w₀ k)
        (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
        (t := setup.m)

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop iterates to natural filtration.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence argument) -/
theorem outerProcess_adapted :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
      (fun k => outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact (measurable_const : Measurable (fun _ : ℕ => w₀)).adapted_const
  | succ k ih =>
      -- outerProcess (k+1) depends on ξ_epoch k 0, …, ξ_epoch k (m-1)
      -- These are independent of the base filtration, but outerProcess k is adapted
      -- Use svrgProcess_adapted pattern with epoch-k samples
      have h_adapted_inner : Adapted (sgdFiltration (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) (setup.hξ_epoch_meas k))
          (fun t => setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
            (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t) := by
        simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
          sgdProcess_adapted (hξ := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
            (hg := setup.toSVRGSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
              setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
      -- outerProcess (k+1) = inner process at step m
      exact h_adapted_inner setup.m

/-- Independence: outerProcess k is independent of fresh epoch-k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, variance bound step) -/
lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi_epoch (k : ℕ) :
    IndepFun (outerProcess w₀ k) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- outerProcess k depends only on ξ_epoch 0, …, ξ_epoch (k-1)
  -- iIndepFun gives independence across disjoint epoch indices
  have h_adapted : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
    apply outerProcess_measurable
  have h_xi_meas : Measurable (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k
  -- Use iIndepFun with disjoint index sets
  have h_disj : Disjoint ({kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 < k}) ({kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 = k}) := by
    simp [Set.disjoint_left]
    intro ⟨i, j⟩ hij hki
    rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hij hki
    linarith
  -- outerProcess k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch i t | i < k)
  -- ξ_epoch k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch k t | t)
  -- iIndepFun + disjoint indices → independence
  -- Use the fact that outerProcess k depends only on samples from epochs < k
  -- and iIndepFun gives independence across disjoint epoch indices
  have h_main : IndepFun (outerProcess w₀ k) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    -- Apply iIndepFun.indepFun with appropriate index sets
    -- The key is that outerProcess k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch i t | i < k, t)
    -- and ξ_epoch k generates σ(ξ_epoch k t | t)
    -- These sigma-algebras are independent by iIndepFun and disjointness of {i < k} and {i = k}
    apply ProbabilityTheory.iIndepFun.indepFun
      (f := fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => setup.ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2)
      (s := {kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 < k})
      (t := {kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 = k})
      (hST := h_disj)
      (hf_Indep := setup.hξ_epoch_indep)
      (hf_meas := fun kt => setup.hξ_epoch_meas kt.1 kt.2)
  exact h_main

/-- One-epoch contraction bound for SVRG outer loop.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, telescoping proof) -/
theorem svrg_outer_one_epoch_contraction
    (f : E → ℝ) {L μ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (k : ℕ)
    (h_int_epoch_start : Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_epoch_end : Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_norm_sq : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_inner : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
              (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_gF : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω)⟫_ℝ)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) *
        ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- Step 1: Apply inner-loop contraction (svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex)
  -- The inner-loop theorem applies for fixed snapshots; we use it with the epoch-k start point
  -- Note: outerProcess k ω is random, but the theorem applies pointwise for each ω
  have h_inner_contract : ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
        η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    -- Apply svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex pointwise for each ω
    -- outerProcess (k+1) ω = svrgProcess (outerProcess k ω) (gradF (outerProcess k ω)) m ω
    -- Use the inner-loop theorem with wTilde := outerProcess k ω (random but fixed for each ω)
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω₀, ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η / μ * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro ω₀
      -- Apply the inner-loop theorem with fixed wTilde := outerProcess k ω₀
      have h_inner := svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex
        (setup := setup.toSVRGSetup) (f := f) (L := L) (μ := μ) (σeff := σeff) (η := η)
        (wStar := wStar) (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        (hgradLTilde := rfl)
        hgrad hsmooth hsc
        (hvar_eff := hvar_eff (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        hunb hmin h_sample_prob hμ_pos hη_pos _hη_L hημ hη
        (T := setup.m)
        hgL h_intL_base
        (h_intL_eff := h_intL_eff (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        (h_int_sq := h_int_sq)
        (h_int_norm_sq := h_int_norm_sq)
        (h_int_inner := h_int_inner)
        (h_int_gF_inner := h_int_gF_inner)
      simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, outerProcess] using h_inner
    -- Integrate the pointwise bound
    calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
        = ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          simp [outerProcess]
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η / μ * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          apply integral_mono _ _
          · exact h_int_epoch_end
          · exact h_int_epoch_start.add (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _)
          · intro ω; exact h_pointwise ω
      _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          rw [integral_add]
          · rw [integral_const_mul, integral_const_mul]
          · exact h_int_epoch_start
          · exact (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _).add (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _)
  -- Step 2: Lipschitz gradient norm bound
  have h_lip_bound : ∀ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro ω
    have h := hsmooth.dist_le_mul (outerProcess w₀ k ω) wStar
    calc ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2
        ≤ ((L : ℝ) * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖) ^ 2 := by gcongr; rwa [dist_eq_norm, dist_eq_norm] at h
      _ = (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by ring
  -- Step 3: Integrate the Lipschitz bound
  have h_lip_int : ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
        ≤ ∫ ω, (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          apply integral_mono _ _ h_lip_bound
          · exact integrable_const _
          · exact h_int_epoch_start.const_mul ((L : ℝ) ^ 2)
      _ = (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          rw [integral_const_mul]
  -- Step 4: Combine
  calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
      ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_inner_contract
    _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ((L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) := by
          gcongr
    _ = ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) *
          ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          ring

/-- Outer-loop linear convergence for SVRG under strong convexity.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, final theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L μ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hρ : (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (K : ℕ)
    (h_int_all : ∀ k ≤ K, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_norm_sq_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_inner_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
              (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_gF_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω)⟫_ℝ)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.P ≤
      ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) ^ K * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  set ρ := (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [outerProcess_zero, integral_const, pow_zero, one_mul]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.probReal_univ, one_mul]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_contract := svrg_outer_one_epoch_contraction w₀ f L μ η wStar
        hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin hη_pos hημ hη K
        (h_int_all K (Nat.le_succ K)) (h_int_all (K + 1) (Nat.le_succ K))
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_norm_sq_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_inner_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_gF_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
      calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.P
          ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.P := h_contract
        _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by gcongr
        _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by rw [pow_succ]; ring

end SVRGOuterSetup
events.after:
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Layer0.ConvexFOC
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: inherits inner-loop infrastructure, adds epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  ξ_epoch : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  hξ_epoch_meas : ∀ k t, Measurable (ξ_epoch k t)
  hξ_epoch_indep : iIndepFun (fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  hξ_epoch_ident : ∀ k t, IdentDistrib (ξ_epoch k t) (ξ_epoch 0 0) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (w₀ : E)

/-- Outer-loop iterate: epoch k endpoint after running m inner steps from epoch-start snapshot.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero : outerProcess w₀ 0 = fun _ => w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω := rfl

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k : ℕ) : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [outerProcess]
      -- svrgProcess_measurable requires:
      -- 1. wTilde := outerProcess k (measurable by IH)
      -- 2. gradLTilde := gradF (outerProcess k) (measurable by hsmooth.continuous.measurable.comp ih)
      -- 3. ξ_epoch k (measurable by setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
      exact setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
        (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
        (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ outerProcess w₀ k)
        (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
        (t := setup.m)

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop iterates to natural filtration.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence argument) -/
theorem outerProcess_adapted :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
      (fun k => outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact (measurable_const : Measurable (fun _ : ℕ => w₀)).adapted_const
  | succ k ih =>
      -- outerProcess (k+1) depends on ξ_epoch k 0, …, ξ_epoch k (m-1)
      -- These are independent of the base filtration, but outerProcess k is adapted
      -- Use svrgProcess_adapted pattern with epoch-k samples
      have h_adapted_inner : Adapted (sgdFiltration (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) (setup.hξ_epoch_meas k))
          (fun t => setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
            (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t) := by
        simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
          sgdProcess_adapted (hξ := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
            (hg := setup.toSVRGSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
              setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
      -- outerProcess (k+1) = inner process at step m
      exact h_adapted_inner setup.m

/-- Independence: outerProcess k is independent of fresh epoch-k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, variance bound step) -/
lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi_epoch (k : ℕ) :
    IndepFun (outerProcess w₀ k) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- outerProcess k depends only on ξ_epoch 0, …, ξ_epoch (k-1)
  -- iIndepFun gives independence across disjoint epoch indices
  have h_adapted : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
    apply outerProcess_measurable
  have h_xi_meas : Measurable (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k
  -- Use iIndepFun with disjoint index sets
  have h_disj : Disjoint ({kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 < k}) ({kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 = k}) := by
    simp [Set.disjoint_left]
    intro ⟨i, j⟩ hij hki
    rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hij hki
    linarith
  -- outerProcess k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch i t | i < k)
  -- ξ_epoch k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch k t | t)
  -- iIndepFun + disjoint indices → independence
  -- Use the fact that outerProcess k depends only on samples from epochs < k
  -- and iIndepFun gives independence across disjoint epoch indices
  have h_main : IndepFun (outerProcess w₀ k) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    -- Apply iIndepFun.indepFun with appropriate index sets
    -- The key is that outerProcess k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch i t | i < k, t)
    -- and ξ_epoch k generates σ(ξ_epoch k t | t)
    -- These sigma-algebras are independent by iIndepFun and disjointness of {i < k} and {i = k}
    apply ProbabilityTheory.iIndepFun.indepFun
      (f := fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => setup.ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2)
      (s := {kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 < k})
      (t := {kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 = k})
      (hST := h_disj)
      (hf_Indep := setup.hξ_epoch_indep)
      (hf_meas := fun kt => setup.hξ_epoch_meas kt.1 kt.2)
  exact h_main

/-- One-epoch contraction bound for SVRG outer loop.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, telescoping proof) -/
theorem svrg_outer_one_epoch_contraction
    (f : E → ℝ) {L μ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (k : ℕ)
    (h_int_epoch_start : Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_epoch_end : Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_norm_sq : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_inner : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
              (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_gF : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω)⟫_ℝ)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) *
        ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- Step 1: Apply inner-loop contraction (svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex)
  -- The inner-loop theorem applies for fixed snapshots; we use it with the epoch-k start point
  -- Note: outerProcess k ω is random, but the theorem applies pointwise for each ω
  have h_inner_contract : ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
        η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    -- Apply svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex pointwise for each ω
    -- outerProcess (k+1) ω = svrgProcess (outerProcess k ω) (gradF (outerProcess k ω)) m ω
    -- Use the inner-loop theorem with wTilde := outerProcess k ω (random but fixed for each ω)
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω₀, ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η / μ * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro ω₀
      -- Apply the inner-loop theorem with fixed wTilde := outerProcess k ω₀
      have h_inner := svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex
        (setup := setup.toSVRGSetup) (f := f) (L := L) (μ := μ) (σeff := σeff) (η := η)
        (wStar := wStar) (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        (hgradLTilde := rfl)
        hgrad hsmooth hsc
        (hvar_eff := hvar_eff (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        hunb hmin h_sample_prob hμ_pos hη_pos _hη_L hημ hη
        (T := setup.m)
        hgL h_intL_base
        (h_intL_eff := h_intL_eff (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        (h_int_sq := h_int_sq)
        (h_int_norm_sq := h_int_norm_sq)
        (h_int_inner := h_int_inner)
        (h_int_gF_inner := h_int_gF_inner)
      simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, outerProcess] using h_inner
    -- Integrate the pointwise bound
    calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
        = ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          simp [outerProcess]
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η / μ * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          apply integral_mono _ _
          · exact h_int_epoch_end
          · exact h_int_epoch_start.add (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _)
          · intro ω; exact h_pointwise ω
      _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          rw [integral_add]
          · rw [integral_const_mul, integral_const_mul]
          · exact h_int_epoch_start
          · exact (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _).add (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _)
  -- Step 2: Lipschitz gradient norm bound
  have h_lip_bound : ∀ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro ω
    have h := hsmooth.dist_le_mul (outerProcess w₀ k ω) wStar
    calc ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2
        ≤ ((L : ℝ) * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖) ^ 2 := by gcongr; rwa [dist_eq_norm, dist_eq_norm] at h
      _ = (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by ring
  -- Step 3: Integrate the Lipschitz bound
  have h_lip_int : ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
        ≤ ∫ ω, (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          apply integral_mono _ _ h_lip_bound
          · exact integrable_const _
          · exact h_int_epoch_start.const_mul ((L : ℝ) ^ 2)
      _ = (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          rw [integral_const_mul]
  -- Step 4: Combine
  calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
      ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_inner_contract
    _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ((L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) := by
          gcongr
    _ = ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) *
          ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          ring

/-- Outer-loop linear convergence for SVRG under strong convexity.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, final theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L μ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hρ : (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (K : ℕ)
    (h_int_all : ∀ k ≤ K, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_norm_sq_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_inner_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
              (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_gF_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω)⟫_ℝ)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.P ≤
      ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) ^ K * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  set ρ := (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [outerProcess_zero, integral_const, pow_zero, one_mul]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.probReal_univ, one_mul]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_contract := svrg_outer_one_epoch_contraction w₀ f L μ η wStar
        hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin hη_pos hημ hη K
        (h_int_all K (Nat.le_succ K)) (h_int_all (K + 1) (Nat.le_succ K))
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_norm_sq_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_inner_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_gF_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
      calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
        _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by gcongr
        _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by rw [pow_succ]; ring

end SVRGOuterSetup

```lean
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Layer0.ConvexFOC
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: inherits inner-loop infrastructure, adds epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  ξ_epoch : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  hξ_epoch_meas : ∀ k t, Measurable (ξ_epoch k t)
  hξ_epoch_indep : iIndepFun (fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  hξ_epoch_ident : ∀ k t, IdentDistrib (ξ_epoch k t) (ξ_epoch 0 0) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (w₀ : E)

/-- Outer-loop iterate: epoch k endpoint after running m inner steps from epoch-start snapshot.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero : outerProcess w₀ 0 = fun _ => w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω := rfl

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k : ℕ) : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [outerProcess]
      -- svrgProcess_measurable requires:
      -- 1. wTilde := outerProcess k (measurable by IH)
      -- 2. gradLTilde := gradF (outerProcess k) (measurable by hsmooth.continuous.measurable.comp ih)
      -- 3. ξ_epoch k (measurable by setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
      exact setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
        (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
        (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ outerProcess w₀ k)
        (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
        (t := setup.m)

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop iterates to natural filtration.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence argument) -/
theorem outerProcess_adapted :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
      (fun k => outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact (measurable_const : Measurable (fun _ : ℕ => w₀)).adapted_const
  | succ k ih =>
      -- outerProcess (k+1) depends on ξ_epoch k 0, …, ξ_epoch k (m-1)
      -- These are independent of the base filtration, but outerProcess k is adapted
      -- Use svrgProcess_adapted pattern with epoch-k samples
      have h_adapted_inner : Adapted (sgdFiltration (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) (setup.hξ_epoch_meas k))
          (fun t => setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
            (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t) := by
        simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
          sgdProcess_adapted (hξ := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
            (hg := setup.toSVRGSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
              setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
      -- outerProcess (k+1) = inner process at step m
      exact h_adapted_inner setup.m

/-- Independence: outerProcess k is independent of fresh epoch-k samples.

lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi_epoch (k : ℕ) :
```

```lean
You are a Lean 4 formal verification engineer working on the StochOptLib library.

## Your task
Create `Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean` implementing the outer-loop convergence analysis
for SVRG (stochastic variance-reduced gradient descent). This formalizes the macro-level
two-level structure where snapshot updates occur every m inner steps.

Also complete the proof of `svrg_variance_reduction` in `Lib/Glue/Probability.lean`
(currently sorry'd) as it is required for the outer-loop variance bound.

## MANDATORY reading order — read ALL before writing any code
1. `docs/CONVENTIONS.md`            — design rules (especially Convention 1, 4, 5)
2. `docs/CATALOG.md`                — existing SVRG inner-loop formalization; check before writing anything new
3. `docs/GLUE_TRICKS.md`            — proof patterns (Section 4b for Archetype B dual integrability, Section 5 for variance)
4. `docs/ALGORITHM_TEMPLATE.md`     — Section 1 (Archetype A vs B); SVRG outer loop is Archetype B at macro level
5. `Algorithms/SVRG.lean`           — inner-loop formalization (svrgProcess, svrgOracle, effectiveSGDSetup)
6. `Algorithms/SGD.lean`            — sgd_convergence_strongly_convex_v2 as model for telescoping structure
7. `Lib/Layer1/StochasticDescent.lean` — stochastic_descent_strongly_convex' signature
8. `Lib/Glue/Probability.lean`      — svrg_variance_reduction (currently sorry'd, must be proved)
9. `Main.lean`                      — sgdProcess, sgdFiltration patterns for process infrastructure

## Mathematical structure

**Outer-loop update rule:**
w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k η w_k (gradF w_k) (ξ_epoch ξ k m) m

where:
- k indexes epochs (outer loop), t indexes steps within epoch (inner loop)
- w_k is the snapshot at epoch k
- svrgProcess runs m inner steps with fixed snapshot (w_k, gradF w_k)
- ξ_epoch extracts the k-th block of m samples from the stream ξ

**Proof chain (outer-loop contraction):**
1. Inner epoch contraction (already proved in SVRG.lean):
   E[‖w_{k,m} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + η·σ_eff,k²/μ
   
2. Variance reduction bound (svrg_variance_reduction — must be proved):
   σ_eff,k² ≤ 4L·(f(w_k) − f*) + 2·‖gradF w_k − gradF w*‖²
   
3. Strong convexity + L-smooth coupling:
   ‖gradF w_k − gradF w*‖² ≤ 2L·(f(w_k) − f*)  (descent lemma consequence)
   ⇒ σ_eff,k² ≤ (4L + 4L)·(f(w_k) − f*) = 8L·(f(w_k) − f*)

4. Epoch contraction with variance term:
   E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + (8ηL/μ)·(f(w_k) − f*)

5. Strong convexity lower bound:
   f(w_k) − f* ≤ (1/2μ)·‖gradF w_k‖² ≤ (L/2)·‖w_k − w*‖²  (L-smooth + strong convexity)

6. Combine to get epoch contraction factor:
   E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ ρ · ‖w_k − w*‖²  where ρ = (1−ημ)^m + (4ηL²/μ²)

7. Telescope K epochs:
   E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ ρ^K · ‖w_0 − w*‖²

**Archetype classification:** B at macro level
- Inner epoch: Archetype A (fixed snapshot, reduces to plain SGD via effectiveSGDSetup)
- Outer loop: Archetype B (snapshot update creates two-level structure)
- Dual integrability required per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b

## MUST constraints (hard — do not deviate)

MUST 1: svrg_variance_reduction proof in Lib/Glue/Probability.lean must be completed:
  - Use control-variate decomposition: g − g̃ + ∇f(w̃)
  - Apply Young's inequality: ‖a − b + c‖² ≤ 2‖a − b‖² + 2‖c‖²
  - Use L-smoothness: ‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s)‖² ≤ L²·‖w − w̃‖² (if gradL is L-smooth in w)
  - Use co-coercivity or descent lemma for variance reduction bound
  - Add Used in: tag per Convention 4

MUST 2: SVRGOuterLoopSetup structure must contain:
  - toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω (nested containment, not extends)
  - m : ℕ (inner epoch length)
  - K : ℕ (number of outer epochs)
  - hK_pos : 0 < K
  - hm_pos : 0 < m

MUST 3: Dual integrability hypotheses (Archetype B pattern per GLUE_TRICKS.md §4b):
  h_int_epoch_end  : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess (k+1) ω - wStar‖^2) P
                     (integrability at END of epoch k+1 — after m inner steps)
  h_int_epoch_start : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess k ω - wStar‖^2) P
                      (integrability at START of epoch k — snapshot point)
  Do NOT merge these. Both are needed for epoch-contraction induction.

MUST 4: hvar placement per Convention 5:
  The outer loop takes hvar on the BASE oracle gradL, NOT on svrgOracle.
  The svrg_variance_reduction lemma derives the effective variance bound from
  the base variance + L-smoothness. Signature:
  hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.sampleDist σ

MUST 5: Measurability field placement per Convention 2:
  - Measurable proj / Measurable gradF go in structure fields if used in process definition
  - For SVRG outer loop: gradF measurability comes from hsmooth.continuous.measurable

MUST 6: Every new lemma must have Used in: tag per Convention 4:
  - Format: "Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, [step description])"

## Implementation steps

### Step 1: Complete svrg_variance_reduction in Lib/Glue/Probability.lean
Prove the variance reduction inequality for control-variate oracle at fixed snapshot:
  E_s[‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s) + gradF(w̃)‖²] ≤ 4L·(f(w) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(w̃) − gradF(w*)‖²

Proof strategy:
1. Expand squared norm: ‖(gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s)) + gradF(w̃)‖²
2. Use Young's: ‖a + b‖² ≤ 2‖a‖² + 2‖b‖²
3. For ‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s)‖²: use L-smoothness of gradL in w (if available)
   OR use convexity + unbiasedness to bound by function value gap
4. For ‖gradF(w̃)‖²: use strong convexity lower bound
5. Take expectation over s, apply unbiasedness

Add docstring with Gap classification (Level 1 — variance-reduction inequality)
and Used in: tag.

### Step 2: Define SVRGOuterLoopSetup
Structure fields:
- toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
- m : ℕ (inner epoch length)
- K : ℕ (outer epochs)
- hK_pos : 0 < K
- hm_pos : 0 < m

### Step 3: Define outerProcess (recursive over epochs)
outerProcess w₀ η gradF ξ m K k ω:
- k = 0: returns w₀
- k + 1: svrgProcess (outerProcess k ω) η (outerProcess k ω) (gradF (outerProcess k ω)) (ξ_epoch ξ k m) m ω

Note: ξ_epoch extracts the k-th block of m samples from the stream.

### Step 4: outerProcess_measurable, outerProcess_adapted, outerProcess_indepFun_xi
- Copy induction pattern from sgdProcess in Main.lean
- Adapt for two-level structure (epoch index k, inner step t)
- Use svrg_variance_reduction for variance bound in independence proof

### Step 5: svrg_outer_to_hyps (bridge lemma)
Convert SVRGOuterLoopSetup at epoch k to StochasticDescentHyps for the
epoch-end iterate. Include:
- wt := outerProcess k
- gradL := svrgOracle (with frozen snapshot from epoch k)
- h_indep from outerProcess_indepFun_xi
- hvar derived via svrg_variance_reduction

### Step 6: epoch_contraction_lemma
One-epoch contraction bound:
  E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ ρ · ‖w_k − w*‖²
where ρ = (1−ημ)^m + (4ηL²/μ²)

Proof:
1. Call svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex for inner epoch
2. Apply svrg_variance_reduction to bound σ_eff,k²
3. Use strong convexity + L-smooth coupling
4. Combine contraction factors

### Step 7: svrg_outer_convergence_strongly_convex
Main theorem: telescope K epoch contractions
  E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ ρ^K · ‖w_0 − w*‖²

Proof by induction on K:
- Base K=0: simp [outerProcess_zero]
- Step K+1: epoch_contraction_lemma + induction hypothesis + gcongr

## Variance hypothesis note

Convention 5 applies at TWO levels:

**Inner epoch (already handled in SVRG.lean):**
- svrgOracle has snapshot-dependent term (gradL(w̃,s) − gradF(w̃))
- Resolution A: absorbed into effective oracle structure
- hvar on base gradL suffices

**Outer loop (new in this file):**
- svrg_variance_reduction derives effective variance from base variance
- No additional Convention 5 issue because variance bound is epoch-dependent
- The epoch contraction factor ρ accounts for variance through σ_eff,k²

Specify hvar as:
  hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.sampleDist σ

The caller must ensure σ² is the base oracle variance (not the effective variance).

## Reusable lemmas from CATALOG

| Lemma | File | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex | Algorithms/SVRG.lean | Step 6 (inner epoch contraction) |
| svrg_variance_reduction | Lib/Glue/Probability.lean | Step 1 + Step 6 (variance bound) |
| stochastic_descent_strongly_convex' | Lib/Layer1/StochasticDescent.lean | inherited via inner loop |
| expectation_norm_sq_gradL_bound | Lib/Layer0/IndepExpect.lean | inner epoch variance step |
| strong_convex_inner_lower_bound | Lib/Layer0/ConvexFOC.lean | epoch contraction coupling |
| lipschitz_gradient_quadratic_bound | Lib/Layer0/GradientFTC.lean | L-smooth coupling in variance reduction |
| norm_sq_sgd_step | Lib/Glue/Algebra.lean | inner epoch pointwise expansion |
| integrable_norm_sq_iterate_comp | Lib/Glue/Measurable.lean | h_int_epoch_end, h_int_epoch_start |

**Leverage prediction:**
- Reused existing: 8 (inner loop theorem + 7 library lemmas)
- New SVRG outer loop: 5 (SVRGOuterLoopSetup, outerProcess, 3 infrastructure lemmas, outer_convergence theorem)
- New glue: 1 (svrg_variance_reduction proof completion)
- Total: reused = 8, new = 6
```

phase2_rounds.agent2_plan:
# SVRG Outer Loop Formalization Plan

## 1. Archetype Classification

**Inner epoch (micro level): Archetype A** via snapshot freeze per GLUE_TRICKS.md §4c
- During one epoch, snapshot `(wTilde, gradLTilde)` is fixed
- Update has form: `process(t+1) = process(t) - η • svrgOracle(process(t), ξ_t)`
- Reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`
- Already proved in `Algorithms/SVRG.lean` as `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`

**Outer loop (macro level): Archetype B**
- Snapshot updates every `m` inner steps: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k ... m`
- Two-level structure prevents direct `simpa` reduction to SGD
- Requires explicit epoch contraction lemma + telescoping over epochs
- Dual integrability required per GLUE_TRICKS.md §4b (epoch_start and epoch_end)

## 2. Proof Chain

### Step 1: Complete `svrg_variance_reduction` (Lib/Glue/Probability.lean)
```
E_s[‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s) + gradF(w̃)‖²]
  ≤ 2·E_s[‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s)‖²] + 2·‖gradF(w̃)‖²  (Young's inequality)
  ≤ 2·L²·‖w − w̃‖² + 2·‖gradF(w̃)‖²  (if gradL is L-smooth in w)
  ≤ 4L·(f(w) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(w̃) − gradF(w*)‖²  (descent lemma + co-coercivity)
```

### Step 2: Inner epoch contraction (already proved)
```
E[‖w_{k,m} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + η·σ_eff,k²/μ
```

### Step 3: Variance bound via svrg_variance_reduction
```
σ_eff,k² ≤ 4L·(f(w_k) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(w_k) − gradF(w*)‖²
         ≤ 4L·(f(w_k) − f*) + 4L·(f(w_k) − f*)  (gradient norm bound from L-smooth + SC)
         = 8L·(f(w_k) − f*)
```

### Step 4: Epoch contraction
```
E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + (8ηL/μ)·(f(w_k) − f*)
                   ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + (4ηL²/μ²)·‖w_k − w*‖²  (SC lower bound)
                   = ρ · ‖w_k − w*‖²
where ρ = (1−ημ)^m + (4ηL²/μ²)
```

### Step 5: Telescope K epochs
```
E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ ρ^K · ‖w_0 − w*‖²
```

## 3. Reusable Lemmas from CATALOG.md

| Lemma | File | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` | `Algorithms/SVRG.lean` | Step 2 (inner epoch contraction) |
| `svrg_variance_reduction` | `Lib/Glue/Probability.lean` | Step 1 + Step 3 (variance bound) |
| `expectation_norm_sq_gradL_bound` | `Lib/Layer0/IndepExpect.lean` | inner epoch variance step |
| `expectation_inner_gradL_eq` | `Lib/Layer0/IndepExpect.lean` | inner epoch unbiasedness |
| `norm_sq_sgd_step` | `Lib/Glue/Algebra.lean` | inner epoch pointwise expansion |
| `integrable_norm_sq_iterate_comp` | `Lib/Glue/Measurable.lean` | h_int_epoch_end, h_int_epoch_start |
| `strong_convex_inner_lower_bound` | `Lib/Layer0/ConvexFOC.lean` | epoch contraction coupling |
| `strongly_convex_gradient_norm_bound` | `Lib/Layer0/ConvexFOC.lean` | gradient norm bound in variance reduction |
| `lipschitz_gradient_quadratic_bound` | `Lib/Layer0/GradientFTC.lean` | L-smooth coupling |

**Reused count: 9**

## 4. Leverage Prediction

**New components to write:**
1. `SVRGOuterLoopSetup` structure
2. `outerProcess` definition
3. `outerProcess_measurable` lemma
4. `outerProcess_adapted` lemma
5. `outerProcess_indepFun_xi` lemma

```lean
∀ w : E, Integrable (fun s => ‖gradL w s‖ ^ 2) ν ∧ ∫ s, ‖gradL w s‖ ^ 2 ∂ν ≤ σ ^ 2
```

### Convention 5 (§5): Iterate-Dependent Variance — Resolution A
✓ SVRG uses **Resolution A**: control-variate term `(gradL(w̃,s) − gradF(w̃))` is absorbed into effective oracle structure via `effectiveSGDSetup`. The `hvar` hypothesis references only the **base oracle** `gradL`, not `svrgOracle`. The `svrg_variance_reduction` lemma derives the effective variance bound from base variance + L-smoothness.

## 8. Statement Scaffold (Stub-Probe Protocol)

### File: `Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean`

```lean
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

namespace SVRGOuterLoopSetup

structure SVRGOuterLoopSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  K : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  hK_pos : 0 < K

variable (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω)

noncomputable def outerProcess : ℕ → Ω → E := sorry
  -- Gap Level 2: recursion over epochs, calls svrgProcess
  -- Approach: induction on k, base k=0 returns w₀, step k+1 calls svrgProcess

theorem outerProcess_measurable (k : ℕ) : Measurable (setup.outerProcess k) := by sorry
  -- Gap Level 2: induction using svrgProcess_measurable
  -- Approach: copy pattern from sgdProcess_measurable in Main.lean

theorem outerProcess_adapted : Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
    setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (fun k => setup.outerProcess k) := by sorry
  -- Gap Level 2: induction using svrgProcess_adapted

lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi_epoch
    (k : ℕ) (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    IndepFun (setup.outerProcess k)
      (fun ω => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m) ω)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by sorry
  -- Gap Level 2: filtration argument, outerProcess k depends on epochs 0..k-1

end SVRGOuterLoopSetup

theorem svrg_outer_convergence_strongly_convex
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgradLTilde : ∀ k, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω) =
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω))
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL
      setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_epoch_end : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.outerProcess (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_epoch_start : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.outerProcess k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ k t, t < setup.m → Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (setup.outerProcess k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω))
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.outerProcess k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω)) t ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ (k * setup.m + t) ω)‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k t, t ≤ setup.m → Integrable (fun ω =>
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.outerProcess k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω)) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ k t, t < setup.m → Integrable (fun ω =>
      ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.outerProcess k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω)) t ω - wStar,
        setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (setup.outerProcess k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω))
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.outerProcess k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.outerProcess k ω)) t ω)
```

# SVRG Outer Loop Formalization Plan

## 1. Archetype Classification

**Inner epoch (micro level): Archetype A** via snapshot freeze per GLUE_TRICKS.md §4c
- During one epoch, snapshot `(wTilde, gradLTilde)` is fixed
- Update has form: `process(t+1) = process(t) - η • svrgOracle(process(t), ξ_t)`
- Reduces to plain SGD via `effectiveSGDSetup`
- Already proved in `Algorithms/SVRG.lean` as `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex`

**Outer loop (macro level): Archetype B**
- Snapshot updates every `m` inner steps: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k ... m`
- Two-level structure prevents direct `simpa` reduction to SGD
- Requires explicit epoch contraction lemma + telescoping over epochs
- Dual integrability required per GLUE_TRICKS.md §4b (epoch_start and epoch_end)

## 2. Proof Chain

### Step 1: Complete `svrg_variance_reduction` (Lib/Glue/Probability.lean)
```
E_s[‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s) + gradF(w̃)‖²]
  ≤ 2·E_s[‖gradL(w,s) − gradL(w̃,s)‖²] + 2·‖gradF(w̃)‖²  (Young's inequality)
  ≤ 2·L²·‖w − w̃‖² + 2·‖gradF(w̃)‖²  (if gradL is L-smooth in w)
  ≤ 4L·(f(w) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(w̃) − gradF(w*)‖²  (descent lemma + co-coercivity)
```

### Step 2: Inner epoch contraction (already proved)
```
E[‖w_{k,m} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + η·σ_eff,k²/μ
```

### Step 3: Variance bound via svrg_variance_reduction
```
σ_eff,k² ≤ 4L·(f(w_k) − f*) + 2·‖gradF(w_k) − gradF(w*)‖²
         ≤ 4L·(f(w_k) − f*) + 4L·(f(w_k) − f*)  (gradient norm bound from L-smooth + SC)
         = 8L·(f(w_k) − f*)
```

### Step 4: Epoch contraction
```
E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + (8ηL/μ)·(f(w_k) − f*)
                   ≤ (1−ημ)^m · ‖w_k − w*‖² + (4ηL²/μ²)·‖w_k − w*‖²  (SC lower bound)
                   = ρ · ‖w_k − w*‖²
where ρ = (1−ημ)^m + (4ηL²/μ²)
```

### Step 5: Telescope K epochs
```
E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ ρ^K · ‖w_0 − w*‖²
```

```lean
    (setup : SVRGOuterLoopSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
```

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Layer0.ConvexFOC
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: inherits inner-loop infrastructure, adds epoch-level sampling.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hm_pos : 0 < m
  ξ_epoch : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → S
  hξ_epoch_meas : ∀ k t, Measurable (ξ_epoch k t)
  hξ_epoch_indep : iIndepFun (fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
  hξ_epoch_ident : ∀ k t, IdentDistrib (ξ_epoch k t) (ξ_epoch 0 0) toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (w₀ : E)

/-- Outer-loop iterate: epoch k endpoint after running m inner steps from epoch-start snapshot.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, all outer-loop theorems) -/
noncomputable def outerProcess : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_zero : outerProcess w₀ 0 = fun _ => w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem outerProcess_succ (k : ℕ) :
    outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
        (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.m ω := rfl

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, bridge construction) -/
theorem outerProcess_measurable (k : ℕ) : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [outerProcess]
      -- svrgProcess_measurable requires:
      -- 1. wTilde := outerProcess k (measurable by IH)
      -- 2. gradLTilde := gradF (outerProcess k) (measurable by hsmooth.continuous.measurable.comp ih)
      -- 3. ξ_epoch k (measurable by setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
      exact setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
        (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
        (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ outerProcess w₀ k)
        (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
        (t := setup.m)

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop iterates to natural filtration.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence argument) -/
theorem outerProcess_adapted :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
      (fun k => outerProcess w₀ k) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact (measurable_const : Measurable (fun _ : ℕ => w₀)).adapted_const
  | succ k ih =>
      -- outerProcess (k+1) depends on ξ_epoch k 0, …, ξ_epoch k (m-1)
      -- These are independent of the base filtration, but outerProcess k is adapted
      -- Use svrgProcess_adapted pattern with epoch-k samples
      have h_adapted_inner : Adapted (sgdFiltration (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) (setup.hξ_epoch_meas k))
          (fun t => setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
            (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t) := by
        simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
          sgdProcess_adapted (hξ := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k)
            (hg := setup.toSVRGSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k))
              setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hgL)
      -- outerProcess (k+1) = inner process at step m
      exact h_adapted_inner setup.m

/-- Independence: outerProcess k is independent of fresh epoch-k samples.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, variance bound step) -/
lemma outerProcess_indepFun_xi_epoch (k : ℕ) :
    IndepFun (outerProcess w₀ k) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- outerProcess k depends only on ξ_epoch 0, …, ξ_epoch (k-1)
  -- iIndepFun gives independence across disjoint epoch indices
  have h_adapted : Measurable (outerProcess w₀ k) := by
    apply outerProcess_measurable
  have h_xi_meas : Measurable (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) := setup.hξ_epoch_meas k
  -- Use iIndepFun with disjoint index sets
  have h_disj : Disjoint ({kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 < k}) ({kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 = k}) := by
    simp [Set.disjoint_left]
    intro ⟨i, j⟩ hij hki
    rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hij hki
    linarith
  -- outerProcess k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch i t | i < k)
  -- ξ_epoch k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch k t | t)
  -- iIndepFun + disjoint indices → independence
  -- Use the fact that outerProcess k depends only on samples from epochs < k
  -- and iIndepFun gives independence across disjoint epoch indices
  have h_main : IndepFun (outerProcess w₀ k) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    -- Apply iIndepFun.indepFun with appropriate index sets
    -- The key is that outerProcess k is measurable w.r.t. σ(ξ_epoch i t | i < k, t)
    -- and ξ_epoch k generates σ(ξ_epoch k t | t)
    -- These sigma-algebras are independent by iIndepFun and disjointness of {i < k} and {i = k}
    apply ProbabilityTheory.iIndepFun.indepFun
      (f := fun kt : ℕ × ℕ => setup.ξ_epoch kt.1 kt.2)
      (s := {kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 < k})
      (t := {kt : ℕ × ℕ | kt.1 = k})
      (hST := h_disj)
      (hf_Indep := setup.hξ_epoch_indep)
      (hf_meas := fun kt => setup.hξ_epoch_meas kt.1 kt.2)
  exact h_main

/-- One-epoch contraction bound for SVRG outer loop.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, telescoping proof) -/
theorem svrg_outer_one_epoch_contraction
    (f : E → ℝ) {L μ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (k : ℕ)
    (h_int_epoch_start : Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_epoch_end : Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_norm_sq : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_inner : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
              (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_gF : ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω)⟫_ℝ)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) *
        ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  -- Step 1: Apply inner-loop contraction (svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex)
  -- The inner-loop theorem applies for fixed snapshots; we use it with the epoch-k start point
  -- Note: outerProcess k ω is random, but the theorem applies pointwise for each ω
  have h_inner_contract : ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
        η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    -- Apply svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex pointwise for each ω
    -- outerProcess (k+1) ω = svrgProcess (outerProcess k ω) (gradF (outerProcess k ω)) m ω
    -- Use the inner-loop theorem with wTilde := outerProcess k ω (random but fixed for each ω)
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω₀, ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
        (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η / μ * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro ω₀
      -- Apply the inner-loop theorem with fixed wTilde := outerProcess k ω₀
      have h_inner := svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex
        (setup := setup.toSVRGSetup) (f := f) (L := L) (μ := μ) (σeff := σeff) (η := η)
        (wStar := wStar) (wTilde := outerProcess w₀ k ω₀) (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        (hgradLTilde := rfl)
        hgrad hsmooth hsc
        (hvar_eff := hvar_eff (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        hunb hmin h_sample_prob hμ_pos hη_pos _hη_L hημ hη
        (T := setup.m)
        hgL h_intL_base
        (h_intL_eff := h_intL_eff (outerProcess w₀ k ω₀))
        (h_int_sq := h_int_sq)
        (h_int_norm_sq := h_int_norm_sq)
        (h_int_inner := h_int_inner)
        (h_int_gF_inner := h_int_gF_inner)
      simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess, outerProcess] using h_inner
    -- Integrate the pointwise bound
    calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
        = ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          simp [outerProcess]
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η / μ * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          apply integral_mono _ _
          · exact h_int_epoch_end
          · exact h_int_epoch_start.add (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _)
          · intro ω; exact h_pointwise ω
      _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          rw [integral_add]
          · rw [integral_const_mul, integral_const_mul]
          · exact h_int_epoch_start
          · exact (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _).add (h_int_epoch_start.const_mul _)
  -- Step 2: Lipschitz gradient norm bound
  have h_lip_bound : ∀ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro ω
    have h := hsmooth.dist_le_mul (outerProcess w₀ k ω) wStar
    calc ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2
        ≤ ((L : ℝ) * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖) ^ 2 := by gcongr; rwa [dist_eq_norm, dist_eq_norm] at h
      _ = (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by ring
  -- Step 3: Integrate the Lipschitz bound
  have h_lip_int : ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
    calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
        ≤ ∫ ω, (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          apply integral_mono _ _ h_lip_bound
          · exact integrable_const _
          · exact h_int_epoch_start.const_mul ((L : ℝ) ^ 2)
      _ = (L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          rw [integral_const_mul]
  -- Step 4: Combine
  calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
      ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω) - setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_inner_contract
    _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P +
          η / μ * ((L : ℝ) ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) := by
          gcongr
    _ = ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) *
          ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
          ring

/-- Outer-loop linear convergence for SVRG under strong convexity.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, final theorem) -/
theorem svrg_outer_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L μ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hρ : (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (K : ℕ)
    (h_int_all : ∀ k ≤ K, Integrable (fun ω => ‖outerProcess w₀ k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_norm_sq_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_inner_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
              (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω) (setup.ξ_epoch k t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner_gF_all : ∀ k < K, ∀ t < setup.m, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω))
          (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω - wStar,
          setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (outerProcess w₀ k ω)
            (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (outerProcess w₀ k ω)) (fun t => setup.ξ_epoch k t) t ω)⟫_ℝ)
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.P ≤
      ((1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ) ^ K * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
  set ρ := (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m + η * (L : ℝ) ^ 2 / μ
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [outerProcess_zero, integral_const, pow_zero, one_mul]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.probReal_univ, one_mul]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_contract := svrg_outer_one_epoch_contraction w₀ f L μ η wStar
        hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin hη_pos hημ hη K
        (h_int_all K (Nat.le_succ K)) (h_int_all (K + 1) (Nat.le_succ K))
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_norm_sq_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_inner_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
        (fun t ht => h_int_inner_gF_all K (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp ht) t ht)
      calc ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ ρ * ∫ ω, ‖outerProcess w₀ K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := h_contract
        _ ≤ ρ * (ρ ^ K * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2) := by gcongr
        _ = ρ ^ (K + 1) * ‖w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by rw [pow_succ]; ring

end SVRGOuterSetup
